description: Items & Equipment System plus Skill/Cooldown System. Create the items package (Item, ItemRarity, ItemSlot, ItemEffect, ItemRegistry with 15-20 items, Inventory) and the skills package (Skill, SkillTree with milestone unlocks). Modify ChestSystem to drop items. Extend PlayerAction to support dynamic skills.
steps: Create src/model/items/ItemRarity.java enum: COMMON, RARE, EPIC, LEGENDARY.
Create src/model/items/ItemSlot.java enum: WEAPON, ARMOR, ACCESSORY.

Create src/model/items/ItemEffect.java class with fields: String stat (ATK, DEF, MAX_HP, MAX_MP, CRIT_CHANCE, SPELL_COST_REDUCTION), int value, Element elementOverride (nullable - for weapons that change basic attack element). Immutable data object.
Create src/model/items/Item.java class - immutable. Fields: String name, String description, ItemRarity rarity, ItemSlot slot, List<ItemEffect> effects. Constructor takes all fields. Getters only.

Create src/model/items/ItemRegistry.java - static registry with at minimum 15-20 items: Weapons (Rusty Sword +5 ATK, Flame Blade +10 ATK FIRE element, Plague Dagger +8 ATK POISON element, Holy Avenger +15 ATK HOLY element +10 crit, and more), Armor (Leather Vest +5 DEF, Bone Plate +10 DEF, Enchanted Robe +5 DEF +20 MAX_MP, Paladin's Guard +15 DEF, and more), Accessories (Mana Crystal +15 MAX_MP -2 SPELL_COST_REDUCTION, Critical Ring +10 CRIT_CHANCE, Plague Mask immune to POISON, Vampire Pendant lifesteal 10%, and more). Use static methods to retrieve by rarity, by slot, random by rarity, etc.

Create src/model/items/Inventory.java extending GameEventDispatcher. 3 slots (weapon, armor, accessory). Methods: equip(Item) fires ITEM_EQUIPPED event, unequip(ItemSlot) fires ITEM_UNEQUIPPED event, getEquipped(ItemSlot), getTotalStatBonus(String stat) sums all equipped item effects for that stat, getElementOverride() returns the element override from equipped weapon (null if none). Has helper hasLifesteal() and getLifestealPercent().

Modify ChestSystem.java: Instead of raw stat boosts, chests now drop Items. Keep same probability tiers: <10 legendary item (random LEGENDARY from ItemRegistry), <25 epic item (random EPIC), <45 rare item (random RARE), <85 common item (random COMMON), else mimic trap (15 damage as before). Fire ITEM_DROPPED event with the item. Auto-equip the item (or replace existing if slot occupied).

Create src/model/skills/Skill.java class: Fields: String id, String name, int manaCost, int cooldownTurns, int currentCooldown, Element element, float damageMultiplier, SkillEffect enum (DAMAGE, HEAL, BUFF_DEF, BUFF_ATK, STUN, MULTI_TARGET). Methods: isReady() returns currentCooldown==0, use() sets currentCooldown=cooldownTurns, tickCooldown() decrements if >0, getEffectiveCost(int spellCostReduction) returns max(0, manaCost - spellCostReduction).
Create src/model/skills/SkillEffect.java enum: DAMAGE, HEAL, BUFF_DEF, BUFF_ATK, STUN, MULTI_TARGET.

Create src/model/skills/SkillTree.java class extending GameEventDispatcher: Manages skill registry and unlocks. Has static default skills (Basic Attack, Fireball, Holy Light, Iron Will) and milestone choices. Method getChoicesForMilestone(int wave) returns 3 Skill options for waves 5, 10, 15 per spec. Method unlockSkill(Skill) adds to player repertoire and fires SKILL_UNLOCKED event. Method getUnlockedSkills() returns all available skills. Method getAvailableActions() returns list including defaults + unlocked.

Modify PlayerAction.java: Add USE_SKILL value to the enum. Add a way to reference skills - add static field or method that maps to skill usage. Or better, add a SKILL_1, SKILL_2, SKILL_3 approach for unlocked skills. Keep original 4 values plus add USE_SKILL_1 through USE_SKILL_6 for unlockable skill slots.

Integrate Inventory into Player.java: Add an Inventory field, getter. When Player performs basic attack, check inventory for element override and crit chance bonus. Modify performBasicAttack to use inventory's getElementOverride() and add crit chance from getTotalStatBonus('CRIT_CHANCE'). Apply ATK bonus from inventory to damage calculations.
Integrate SkillTree into Player.java: Add a SkillTree field, getter. Player should be able to execute skills from the skill tree via new PlayerAction values.
Ensure all files compile. Run: javac -d out -sourcepath src src/model/events/*.java src/model/status/*.java src/model/items/*.java src/model/skills/*.java src/model/*.java src/controller/*.java
acceptance_criteria: ItemRegistry has at least 15 items across all rarities and slots
Inventory correctly tracks 3 equipment slots and computes stat bonuses
ChestSystem drops items instead of raw stat boosts
Skill class supports cooldowns, elements, and cost reduction
SkillTree offers 3 choices at wave 5, 10, and 15 milestones
Player.performBasicAttack uses inventory element override and crit bonus
No I/O in model or controller
verification: Run: javac -d out -sourcepath src src/model/events/*.java src/model/status/*.java src/model/items/*.java src/model/skills/*.java src/model/*.java src/controller/*.java - must exit 0
Run: grep -rn 'System\.' src/model/ src/controller/ | grep -v '// ' - no System.in/out/err
